title: Fix `super.pre/post_randomize` with no base class method

features.name: virtual class with type parameter inheritance
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with a type parameter that is extended by a concrete class

features.name: super.pre_randomize call when immediate parent has no pre_randomize method
features.description: Code should include a class calling super.pre_randomize where the immediate parent class does not define pre_randomize
